title: Uni's more purple mc
description: I changed a bunch of textures that I thought should be more purple to be more purple tinted.
body: ## Hello! This is my first texture pack so constructive feedback is welcome! I made a bunch of textures more purple tinted because I like them being purple tinted better and thought I'd share it for other purple liking people to use. I did also change the way armor looks to make it sort of magical girl esque? Or minimal I guess. It's a flowery / floating armor type of style. Very simple and you can see your skin while wearing it. _**(this is taken out and separated to it's own pack in V2)**_ ------------------------------------------------------------ - The purple color changes affect the following: - Netherite stuff - Ancient Debris - Ender items - Iron stuff - Gold stuff - Soul fire stuff - Diamond stuff - wooden items - Arrows - Maps - Allay - Bats - Wither - Ghast - Sniffer > is now purple and blue because I did not like it's original color scheme (I can't be the only one that thinks it's a bad color scheme, like c'mon it makes it so ugly) - Blue axolotl - Trident - XP bottle - Elytra - End portal - Certain mob effects - Chainmail - anvil - cauldron - hopper - Enchanted book - ghast tear - nether star - wither rose - totem of undying - enchant table - crafting table - Flint & Steel ------------------------------------------------------------ Added some purple themed splash texts ------------------------------------------------------------ I did not change armor trims because I got too lazy, but with my armor changes I don't think they are very necessary. ------------------------------------------------------------ You may use this for personal use only and in modpacks. Do not change the textures. Do not re-upload elswhere. If you showcase this in a Youtube video let me know! Thank you. :)
